channel.title: Free Printables on Early Reading Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Free Printables on Early Reading Tools

item.title: The Free Phonics Starter Kit: Everything You Need to Begin
item.description: A complete, step-by-step phonics starter kit for parents — letter sounds, blending, short vowels, and your first 30 lessons. Free and printable.

item.title: Fry Sight Words: The Complete 1,000-Word List by Level (Free Printable)
item.description: The complete Fry sight word list — all 1,000 words organized into 10 levels, with teaching strategies, flashcard tips, and free printables.

item.title: Dolch Sight Word List: Complete 220 Words by Grade Level (Free Printable)
item.description: The complete Dolch sight word list — all 220 words organized by grade level from Pre-K through Grade 3, plus 95 nouns. Free printable PDF included.
